title: VimFu — Recipe: Number All Lines
description: Use a substitute with an expression to prepend line numbers to every line in the file.

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim
Create demo file with a simple list

setup.content:
apple
banana
cherry
date
elderberry
fig
grape

steps.say: Here's a plain list with no line numbers. Let's prepend a number to each line using substitute with an expression.
Backslash equals in the replacement means evaluate an expression. Line dot returns the current line number.
Each line now starts with its number. One apple, two banana, three cherry, and so on.
Backslash equals turns the replacement into a Vim expression. Line dot gives the line number.
